metadata.name: brainmaze-zmq
metadata.summary: Utils for around zmq supporting multiprocess communication

modules.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils
documentation: Socket utility functions for ZeroMQ and general networking operations.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.send_exit_signal
documentation:
Sends an exit signal to a specific ZeroMQ port.

Args:
    port (int): Port to send the exit signal.
    context (zmq.Context, optional): ZeroMQ context to use.
                                    If not provided, a new one is created.

Returns:
    bool: Always returns False (placeholder for success indication).

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_pull_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ PULL socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to bind the socket to.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured PULL socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_push_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ PUSH socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to connect the socket to.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured PUSH socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_request_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ REQ socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to connect the socket to.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured REQ socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_reply_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ REP socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to bind the socket to.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured REP socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_publisher_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ PUB socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to bind the socket to.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured PUB socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.setup_subscriber_socket
documentation:
Sets up a ZeroMQ SUB socket.

Args:
    port (int): Port to connect the socket to.
    sub_topic (str): Subscription topic filter.
    context (zmq.Context): ZeroMQ context to use.

Returns:
    zmq.Socket: Configured SUB socket.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.is_socket_alive
documentation:
Checks if a ZeroMQ socket is alive and operational.

Args:
    zmq_socket (zmq.Socket): ZeroMQ socket to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the socket is alive, False otherwise.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.ping_ip
documentation:
Pings an IP address to check connectivity.

Args:
    ip_address (str): IP address to ping.

Returns:
    bool: True if the ping is successful, False otherwise.

functions.name: brainmaze_zmq.utils.check_port
documentation:
Checks if a port on a given IP address is open.

Args:
    ip_address (str): IP address to check.
    port (int): Port number to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the port is open, False otherwise.

modules.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract
documentation: Abstract base classes for handling ZeroMQ socket operations.

classes.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler.__init__
documentation: Initialize the ABExitHandler with context and socket attributes.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler.setup_exit_handler
documentation:
Set up a PULL socket to listen for an exit signal.

Args:
    port (int): The port to bind the PULL socket to.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler.on_recv_exit
documentation:
Handle receiving an exit signal.

Args:
    msg (list): The message received via the PULL socket.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler.kill_exit_handler
documentation: Close the exit socket and clean up resources.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABExitHandler.stop
documentation: Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses to handle stopping operations.
Abstract base class for handling an exit signal via a ZeroMQ PULL socket.

classes.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABReplyHandler

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABReplyHandler.__init__
documentation: Initialize the ABReplyHandler with context and socket attributes

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABReplyHandler.setup_reply_handler
documentation:
Set up a REP socket to handle incoming requests.

Args:
    port (int): The port to bind the REP socket to.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABReplyHandler.kill_reply_handler
documentation: Close the reply socket and clean up resources.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABReplyHandler.reply
documentation:
Abstract method to handle incoming messages and provide a reply.

Args:
    msg (list): The message received via the REP socket.
Abstract base class for handling a REPLY mechanism via a ZeroMQ REP socket.

classes.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABRequestHandler

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABRequestHandler.__init__
documentation: Initialize the ABRequestHandler with context and socket attributes.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABRequestHandler.setup_request_handler
documentation:
Set up a REQ socket to send requests.

Args:
    port (int): The port to connect the REQ socket to.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABRequestHandler.kill_request_handler
documentation: Close the request socket and clean up resources.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABRequestHandler.request_reply
documentation:
Send a request and wait for a reply.

Args:
    msg (str): The request message to send.

Returns:
    Any: The reply received from the server.
Abstract base class for handling requests via a ZeroMQ REQ socket.

classes.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABPublisherHandler

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABPublisherHandler.__init__
documentation: Initialize the ABPublisherHandler with context and socket attributes.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABPublisherHandler.setup_publisher_handler
documentation:
Set up a PUB socket to publish messages.

Args:
    port (int): The port to bind the PUB socket to.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABPublisherHandler.kill_publisher_handler
documentation: Close the publisher socket and clean up resources.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABPublisherHandler.publish
documentation:
Publish a message with a topic.

Args:
    topic (str): The topic for the message.
    msg (tuple): The message to publish.
Abstract base class for publishing messages via a ZeroMQ PUB socket.

classes.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABSubscriberHandler

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABSubscriberHandler.__init__
documentation: Initialize the ABSubscriberHandler with context and socket attributes.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABSubscriberHandler.setup_subscriber_handler
documentation:
Set up a SUB socket to subscribe to messages on a topic.

Args:
    port (int): The port to connect the SUB socket to.
    topic (str): The topic to subscribe to.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABSubscriberHandler.kill_subscriber_handler
documentation: Close the subscriber socket and clean up resources.

methods.name: brainmaze_zmq.abstract.ABSubscriberHandler.on_recv_data
documentation:
Abstract method to handle incoming data.

Args:
    msg (list): The message received via the SUB socket.
Abstract base class for subscribing to messages via a ZeroMQ SUB socket.
